data.title: Isolated Quote Form

sections.title: Where friction appears
items: Form updates and their validation are implicit development complexity
Routing is built-in with the core creating complexity
Testing is tangled from the core capability

sections.title: What isolation changes
items: Validation logic contained within the widget
Routing concern safely moved in its own environment
Use modern UI for more future proof deliverables

data.closing: Core transactional flow is reduced more liberating dev team on what matters
